nl_query: Show the complete encryption and scanning chain for each script created in the last 7 days: script URN, DEK ID, KEK external ID, KEK scope, KEK status, scanner device name, and whether the DEK was re-wrapped after a Direct Connect outage.
failed_sql: SELECT a.urn, dek.id AS dek_id, kek.external_id, kek.scope, kek.status, sd.device_name, CASE WHEN dek.id IN (SELECT dek_id FROM data_encryption_key WHERE key_encryption_key_id IN (SELECT kek_id FROM key_encryption_key WHERE scope = 'WORKSTATION')) THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS was_rewrapped_after_dc_outage FROM answer_script a JOIN data_encryption_key dek ON dek.id = a.dek_id JOIN key_encryption_key kek ON kek.id = dek.key_encryption_key_id LEFT JOIN scanner_device sd ON sd.id = kek.workstation_id WHERE a.created_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT 1000;
